programs.title: Celebrity Lingo
programs.desc: Adil Ray hosts the game of words as Good Morning Britain's Charlotte Hawkins and Sean Fletcher go head-to-head with Cold Feet legends Fay Ripley and John Thomson for charity.

programs.desc: Ben Shephard hosts as TV and radio presenter Vernon Kay, former footballer and property presenter Dion Dublin, and much-loved actress Amanda Barrie try to master the machine.
